refinement_sections.content: We need to understand how many people might want our new beverage product and what factors affect their choices.
Identify things that might make our product successful, like flavor, packaging, price, and marketing.
Look at how much of our product people might buy at different prices.
Think about how we can set a price that makes money but also gets people to buy our product.
Decide how to show our findings to management, maybe using charts or graphs to make it clear.
Create a structure for our detailed document that includes an introduction, analysis, pricing strategy, and conclusion.
